message:
🌱 Add tikv: Support build on Apple Silicon/M1 mission (#768)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

+      {
+        "title": "Check current tikv deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your tiup --version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv\nhelm list -n tikv 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working tikv installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review tikv configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant tikv configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv\nkubectl get configmap -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=tikv\n```\n## Feature Request\n\nSupport native build on Apple Silicon/M1\n\nAnd I'm currently working on this. Here are some complete tasks and related issues:"

+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support build on Apple Silicon/M1",

+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n tikv -l app.kubernetes.io/name=tikv\nkubectl get events -n tikv --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support build on Apple Silicon/M1\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
